12 specialized verticals

SuiteHub for your industry, not generic.

Each vertical inherits the SuiteHub core and adds the flows, jargon and screens your industry needs. No paying for features from another industry you'll never use.

HUB Workshop
HUB Restaurant
HUB POS
HUB Pet
HUB Beauty
HUB Clinic
HUB Gym
HUB Laundry
HUB Real Estate
HUB Hotel
HUB Phone
HUB Traffic
Auto-repair shops

HUB Workshop

Quick vehicle intake, work orders with services and parts, online booking, vehicle + customer linked, direct e-invoicing.

In production
QS Express — Auto-repair shop in La Chorrera
Ask about HUB Workshop

Vertical-specific features

Quick intake
Capture plate, customer and complaint in 30 seconds
Work orders
Services + parts + time + status
Online booking
Customer books on the web, you confirm
Vehicle history
Past services, mileage, upcoming reviews
Service catalog
Prices, duration, assignable technicians
Electronic invoicing
DGI Panama with CUFE and QR · multi-country roadmap 2026

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Restaurants and bars

HUB Restaurant

Live table state, orders fired to kitchen and bar, KDS, split bills, tips, delivery integration, shift reports.

Ask about HUB Restaurant

Vertical-specific features

Live tables
Floor map, free/occupied/check requested
Kitchen display (KDS)
Order separated by station: kitchen, bar, dessert
Split bills
Per person, per item, mixed
Tips and discounts
Configurable per table or ticket
Delivery
Orders via WhatsApp/web → straight to kitchen
Shift reports
Cash close, top dishes, server of the day

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Point of sale · register

HUB POS

The register itself. Take the order by table or to-go, apply modifiers, fire it to the kitchen, generate the pre-bill and charge with any method. Cash close with reconciliation. Installable as an app and runs locally without depending on the internet.

Ask about HUB POS

Vertical-specific features

Fast order taking
By table or to-go, products by category in seconds
Modifiers and notes
Doneness, paid extras, per-item notes
Pre-bill and checkout
Multi-method (cash, card, Yappy, mixed), automatic change
Cash close
Per-shift reconciliation, audited differences
Works offline
Installable PWA; keeps charging without internet and syncs later
Receipt with e-invoice QR
Configurable receipt with CUFE and DGI QR

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Veterinarians and pet shops

HUB Pet

Digital medical record per pet, automatic vaccine and deworming reminders, owner + pet booking, regulated veterinary products.

Ask about HUB Pet

Vertical-specific features

Digital medical record
Full history, vaccines, allergies, weight
Automatic reminders
Upcoming vaccine, deworming, checkup
Owner + pet booking
Vet, grooming, hospitalization
Prescriptions with stock
Drug + regulated-sales control
Pet gallery
Before/after photos, X-rays

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Beauty salons, spas, barbershops

HUB Beauty

Online booking by service and stylist, commissions per stylist, retail products + services, SMS/WhatsApp reminders.

Ask about HUB Beauty

Vertical-specific features

Online booking
Customer picks service, time and professional
Stylist commissions
Automatic calculation per service or product
Products + services
Combined sale on a single ticket
WhatsApp reminders
Confirm attendance 24h ahead

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Practices and clinics

HUB Clinic

Digital clinical record, doctor schedule, electronic prescriptions, patient history, billing to insurers.

Ask about HUB Clinic

Vertical-specific features

Digital records
SOAP, history, vital signs
Multi-doctor schedule
Per specialist, room, equipment
Digital prescriptions
Signed PDF or printed, regulated control
Health insurance
Billing to insurers with codes

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Gyms, crossfit, yoga

HUB Gym

Monthly/annual memberships, QR access control, classes with capacity caps, assignable trainers, churn alerts.

Ask about HUB Gym

Vertical-specific features

Memberships
Recurring billing, freeze, suspend
Access control
Customer enters by scanning QR from their app
Capacity classes
Online booking, waitlist
Retention
Alert if a member misses 14 days

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Professional laundries

HUB Laundry

Receipt with pickup code, process stage (wash/dry/iron), price by kilo or by item, ready-when-done reminder.

Ask about HUB Laundry

Vertical-specific features

Receipt with code
Customer picks up with their unique code
Process stages
Received → washed → dried → ready
Per kilo or per item
Configurable per service
WhatsApp notice
Auto-message when ready

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Real estate

HUB Real Estate

Property portfolio, leads with pipeline stages, rental contracts with recurring billing, agents with commissions.

Ask about HUB Real Estate

Vertical-specific features

Property catalog
Photos, video, price, status
Lead pipeline
Interested → visit → offer → close
Rental contracts
Auto-monthly billing, deposits
Agent commissions
Per closed sale or managed rental

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Boutique hotels and hostels

HUB Hotel

Room calendar, reservations per channel (Booking/Airbnb/direct), check-in/out with invoice, minibar consumption, housekeeping.

Ask about HUB Hotel

Vertical-specific features

Tape chart
Calendar view of occupancy per room
Check-in / out
Passport, digital signature, instant invoice
Housekeeping
Room status: clean/dirty/inspection
Channel manager
Sync with Booking, Airbnb, Expedia (Pro+)

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Phone repair shops

HUB Phone

Device intake with diagnosis, quote per damage, parts linked to the order, digital warranty, ticket with code.

Ask about HUB Phone

Vertical-specific features

Initial diagnosis
Model, visible damage, password, accessories
Customer quote
Approve and proceed / decline and return
Linked parts
Stock decrements when installed
Digital warranty
PDF with QR for later claims

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Footfall analytics and shopper behavior

HUB Traffic

Automatic people counting, zone heatmaps, dwell time, visit-to-sale conversion cross-referenced with your POS, hour/day comparisons and real-time capacity alerts.

Ask about HUB Traffic

Vertical-specific features

People counting
Real-time ins and outs via sensor or camera
Heatmaps
Hot and cold zones by hour, day, week
Dwell time
Average time people spend in each zone
Visit→sale conversion
Cross-reference with HUB POS to measure real close rate
Comparisons
Peak hour, busiest day, peaks vs. average
Capacity alerts
Alert when the people limit is exceeded

+ All SuiteHub core features depending on the edition you pick.

Is your industry not on the list?

If your industry has 50+ potential businesses in any of our markets (Panama, USA, Venezuela, Spain), we can build a specific vertical for you. Tell us on WhatsApp and we'll evaluate.

Tell us about your industry

SuiteHub is the business management platform for SMBs across Panama, USA, Venezuela, and Spain that want enterprise-grade technology without the complexity or cost.
